title: Public BF registry entry minimum (AFB-only; not part of afb.execution.v1 wire)
description: Shared public-view basis for `bfs` (registry push) and `connector` (record CRUD) — see BFRegistryEntry.to_public_dict() in AFB/backend/trade/models.py.
$comment: additionalProperties intentionally left open (default true) — this schema is a composable base, extended via allOf by connector.record.v1.json and bfs.registry.v1.json.
